name: sapstack
description: SAP Enterprise Operations Platform — 20 plugins, 16 agents, 18 commands, MCP Server (20+ tools, 5 prompts), VS Code Extension, NPM, Compliance (K-SOX/SOC2/ISO27001/GDPR), exceptions/hooks/country/bridge frameworks, 55+ IMG guides, 43+ Best Practices, 7 country localizations, 6 languages
author: BoxLogoDev

plugins.name: SAP Financial Accounting
plugins.description: GL, AP, AR, AA — posting, closing, tax, special G/L

plugins.name: SAP Controlling
plugins.description: CCA, PCA, IO, product costing, CO-PA, allocation cycles

plugins.name: SAP Treasury & Cash Management
plugins.description: Liquidity planning, cash position, payment run, bank statement

plugins.name: SAP Materials Management
plugins.description: Procurement, inventory, GR/IR, invoice verification

plugins.name: SAP Sales & Distribution
plugins.description: Order-to-cash, billing, credit management, pricing

plugins.name: SAP Production Planning
plugins.description: MRP, production orders, shop floor, capacity planning

plugins.name: SAP HCM On-Premise
plugins.description: ECC HCM and H4S4 — PA, OM, Payroll, Time Management, FI posting

plugins.name: SAP SuccessFactors
plugins.description: Employee Central, ECP, Recruiting, LMS, Performance, People Analytics, SF integration

plugins.name: SAP ABAP Development
plugins.description: Classic ABAP, RAP, CDS views, BAdI, clean core, performance, short dump

plugins.name: SAP S/4HANA Migration
plugins.description: ECC to S/4HANA: brownfield, greenfield, BP migration, custom code adaptation

plugins.name: SAP Business Technology Platform
plugins.description: BTP extensions, CAP, Fiori Elements, OData, Integration Suite

plugins.name: SAP BASIS Administration
plugins.description: System administration, transport management, performance, security

plugins.name: SAP BC (Korean BC Consultant)
plugins.description: 한국 SAP BC(Basis) 컨설턴트 특화 — Solution Manager Korea, HANA 한국 로케일, 전자세금계산서, 망분리, KISA 보안, PFCG 한국 권한, K-SOX 내부통제. 글로벌 Basis 주제는 sap-basis 참조.

plugins.name: SAP GTS (Global Trade Services)
plugins.description: Global Trade Services — Export/Import compliance, SPL screening, HS code classification, customs declaration, FTA preference, L/C management. 한국 UNI-PASS 관세청 연동 특화.

plugins.name: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
plugins.description: Clean Core, Key User Extensibility, 3-Tier Extension Model, Fit-to-Standard, Cloud ALM, Quarterly Release, CSP deployment

plugins.name: SAP Plant Maintenance
plugins.description: Equipment master, functional location, maintenance order, notification, preventive maintenance, breakdown analysis, MTBF/MTTR

plugins.name: SAP Quality Management
plugins.description: Inspection lot, inspection plan, results recording, usage decision, quality notification, quality certificate, sampling, SPC

plugins.name: SAP Warehouse Management
plugins.description: Warehouse structure, storage type/bin, transfer order, putaway/picking strategies, physical inventory in WM. Legacy ECC module — deprecated in S/4HANA (use EWM).

plugins.name: SAP Extended Warehouse Management
plugins.description: Warehouse process types, warehouse order, wave management, packing, RF framework, physical inventory, resource/labor management, yard management. Modern replacement for WM.

plugins.name: SAP Evidence Loop Session (v1.5.0)
plugins.description: Turn-aware advisory sessions — hypothesis/verify loops without live SAP access. Orchestrates the other 14 plugins and 9 agents. Enables end-user web triage with operator escalation.

plugins.name: SAP Integrated Business Planning
plugins.description: Demand sensing, S&OP, supply planning, inventory optimization, response & supply, control tower. Cloud-native successor to APO. BTP-deployed.

plugins.name: SAP Analytics Cloud
plugins.description: Cloud BI, Story design, Analytic Applications, Planning models, Smart Predict, BW Bridge, Datasphere connectivity. Cloud-native analytics replacing on-prem BI.

plugins.name: SAP Ariba
plugins.description: Strategic sourcing, contracts, procurement, supplier lifecycle (SLP), spend analysis, Ariba Network. Cloud procurement integrated with S/4 via CIG.

plugins.name: SAP Integration Suite + Datasphere
plugins.description: Cloud integration platform — CPI (Cloud Platform Integration) iFlows, API Management, Event Mesh, Open Connectors, Datasphere (data warehouse cloud). PO/PI successor.
